eel: noun. Any freshwater fish of the order Anguilliformes, which are elongated and resemble snakes.
ell: symbol. ISO 639-2 /T & ISO 639-3 language code for Greek.
else: adjective. Other; in addition to previously mentioned items.
ess: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Central Siberian Yupik.

hell: proper noun. A place of torment where some or all sinners are believed to go after death and evil spirits are believed to be.
help: noun. Action given to provide assistance; aid.
helps: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of help
lee: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Lyélé.
pee: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Taje.
peel: verb. To remove the skin or outer covering of.
peh: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Bonan.
pes: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Iranian Persian.
see: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Seneca.
seels: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of seel
seep: verb. To ooze or pass slowly through pores or other small openings, and in overly small quantities; said of liquids, etc.
sees: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of see
sel: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Selkup.
sell: verb. To transfer goods or provide services in exchange for money.
sells: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of sell
she: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Sheko.
